title: Snow Devils
writer: Charles Sinclair, Bill Finger, Ivan Reiner
actors: Giacomo Rossi Stuart, Ombretta Colli, Renato Baldini
plot: A Himalaya weather station is destroyed. Commander Rod Jackson and his party are sent to investigate and are captured by the Aytia, a race of giants. The means to defeat them lead Jackson straight to the Jupiter moon Callisto itself.
